message:
chore: remove Cargo.lock and add native test artifacts

Remove Cargo.lock from tracking to prevent merge conflicts during
concurrent multi-agent development. Add tests/artifacts_native/ for
native integration test fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
